name: Raffle
shortDescription: Host provably fair on-chain raffles within your guild.
longDescription: The Raffle module allows dGuilds to organize secure, on-chain raffles with configurable ticket supply, pricing, and optional gate gating. Once launched, a raffle must sell out before a winner can be drawn — ensuring transparency and commitment.
detailedDescription: Guild admins configure the ticket mint, ticket price, total ticket supply, optional gate, reward mint and token amount, and optional reward image. After initialization, the raffle cannot be cancelled and must sell out before drawing a winner. A random winner is selected on-chain, rewards are distributed, and proceeds are claimable. Pricing: Base — 0 USDC monthly, 5 USDC per raffle, 1 concurrent raffle; Grow — 15 USDC monthly, 0 USDC per raffle, 3 concurrent raffles; Pro — 25 USDC monthly, 0 USDC per raffle, 10 concurrent raffles included, then 5 USDC per additional active raffle slot per month.

activationInstructions.intro: Summon your community. Announce the prize. Let fate decide the victor.
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per raffle when you create one on the Base tier.
